parents.subject: LU-19557 llapi: fix race in printf username/group cache

commit.subject: LU-18756 ofd: add per-object bit for resource id repair
commit.message:
LU-18756 ofd: add per-object bit for resource id repair

The resource ID repair checks whether a UID/GID/PROJID is not set on
an OST object yet. If all or some IDs are not set and the requirements
are met, the IDs are updated asynchronously, e.g., as part of a read
operation.

Checking whether it is necessary to repair an object requires
retrieving its attributes. Currently, this needs to be done repeatedly
even if the object does not need to be repaired because all IDs are
already set, resulting in needless calls to "dt_attr_get()".

This patch adds a new per-object bit to "struct ofd_object" to signify
that the object IDs are all set. The bit is set when the ID repair
verified an object's IDs. This provides a fast path for the ID repair
to skip retrieving the object attributes when its not needed.

Signed-off-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I5360044e25ac60a9ed2acac3dcfb4f01976c658a
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62491
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
